fixtures.transcript: ATP is a molecule that transfers usable chemical energy within cells. During oxidative phosphorylation, electrons move through a membrane protein chain. That movement pumps protons, and the returning proton flow powers ATP synthase. Diffusion moves particles down a concentration gradient, whereas active transport uses energy to move them against a gradient.
expectedAcceptedConcepts: diffusion and active transport differ in direction and energy use

fixtures.transcript: In this six-week greenhouse study of young bean plants under low nitrogen, the treated group grew about ten percent taller on average. The observation does not establish the same effect in mature plants or field conditions. Enzymes generally lower activation energy; catalase breaking down hydrogen peroxide is one example. Yesterday one seedling leaned toward a window.
expectedAcceptedConcepts: the bean result is limited to the stated population, condition, and period

fixtures.transcript: [00:01:00] The quiz is due Friday. I always joke that mitochondria need tiny batteries. As discussed earlier, this proves it. On the next slide, Dr. Rivera says she once forgot her notes. A student asks whether the room will stay open after class. It becomes larger when this happens.
Both liquid water and water vapor contain H2O molecules. Ice also consists of H2O molecules arranged in a crystal lattice.

# Beginning: Photosynthesis stores light energy in chemical bonds.
